metadata.title: Yoten Labs | AI-native product studio
metadata.description: Yoten Labs designs, builds, and operates AI-native software for teams that need clarity, trust, and measurable outcomes.

hero.title: AI systems built to ship as real products
hero.description: Yoten Labs designs, builds, and operates software where AI is the core system behind the experience and the operation. We combine product thinking, production engineering, and disciplined delivery for B2C and B2B teams.

panel.label: Positioning
panel.description: We prioritize clarity, trust, and measurable outcomes across data workflows, retrieval and generation pipelines, guardrails, evaluation, monitoring, and scalable delivery.

metrics.label: Core systems designed around AI from day one.
Real products with operational controls and clear ownership.
Evaluation, guardrails, and reliability built into the stack.
Delivery tied to measurable improvement, not vanity metrics.

whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.description: The MVP stays focused, but the core system is built for production pressure from the start.

items.title: AI-native product development
items.description: Product strategy, UX, and engineering shaped around AI as the operating system, not a feature layer.

items.title: RAG and generation pipelines
items.description: Retrieval, orchestration, prompt design, and generation flows designed for useful outputs and stable operations.

items.title: Evaluation and monitoring
items.description: We instrument quality, latency, cost, and behavior so teams can improve with evidence.

items.title: Guardrails and safety
items.description: Controls for permissions, risky outputs, policy boundaries, and predictable user-facing behavior.

items.title: Cost, quotas, reliability
items.description: Quota enforcement, fallback paths, and operational limits that keep AI features economically sane.

items.title: B2C and B2B delivery
items.description: Consumer and enterprise products delivered with clear scope, reliable execution, and room to scale.

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.description: The work stays practical: align, build, evaluate, and operate with the same level of discipline.

steps.title: Align on outcomes
steps.description: We define the user problem, the operational target, and the measurable result before building.

steps.title: Build the core system
steps.description: We implement the workflows, retrieval and generation layers, interfaces, and controls that matter.

steps.title: Evaluate and harden
steps.description: We pressure-test prompts, outputs, latency, quotas, and edge cases before widening exposure.

steps.title: Ship and operate
steps.description: We launch with monitoring, ownership, and iteration loops that keep the product improving.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Current products being developed inside Yoten Labs.

cards.name: WearingDaily
cards.description: Consumer fashion app for fast outfit generation using deterministic formulas, curated catalog completion, saved looks, packs twice a week, optional photo try-on, and video try-on as a paid premium feature.

cards.name: SkillTalk
cards.description: Voice-first platform for scenario-based training and live sessions, focused on measurable improvement loops and production-grade controls.

cards.name: VoiceForge AI
cards.description: Multi-tenant real-time roleplay ecosystem with evaluation, guardrails, and iterative prompt optimization.

cards.name: Platform Health.ai
cards.description: Multi-tenant healthcare operations platform with RBAC, documents, scheduling, billing events, and real-time session flows designed for clarity, trust, and measurable outcomes.

items.question: Do you only build MVPs?
items.answer: No. We can shape the MVP, but we build the core system with production constraints in mind.

items.question: Do you work with enterprise teams?
items.answer: Yes. We build for both B2C and B2B contexts, including multi-tenant and operational platforms.

items.question: Do you handle reliability and controls?
items.answer: Yes. Guardrails, monitoring, quotas, and cost controls are part of the delivery scope.

items.question: Can you work on voice and real-time products?
items.answer: Yes. Real-time sessions, roleplay systems, and voice-first experiences are active areas for us.

contact.title: Ready to ship an AI-native product?
contact.description: If you need a team that can move from product framing to production engineering without losing clarity, talk to us.
